name: Italian Tray 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the carrots: Use a potato peeler to create long, thin strips. Roll up the strips and place them side by side in a deep bowl. Cover with water and refrigerate for a few hours or overnight.
2. Prepare the celery branches: Cut celery stalks into 3-inch lengths. Make small slits on each end of the stalks (not all the way through). Place in the bowl, cover with water, and refrigerate for a few hours or overnight.
3. Prepare the radishes: Slice many thin "almost through" slices from the tips of the radishes. They will open up after being placed in a bowl covered with cold water; refrigerate for a few hours or overnight.
4. Arrange the prepared ingredients on a beautiful glass serving tray or other large serving tray, carefully placing the carrots, celery branches, and opened radishes. Top with cream cheese, cherry tomatoes, tuna or deviled ham salad, olives, green onions, and any additional desired toppings. Serve chilled.
